settings.hero_subheading: Everything you want to know about our snacks, ingredients, orders, and the science behind what we do.
settings.contact_body: We read every message and respond within 24 hours. No bots, no scripts - just us.
settings.cta_subheading: Take the 2-minute quiz and get matched to the snack designed for your gut-brain pattern.

settings.question: What makes 100 Cal Snacks different from other protein bars?
settings.answer:
Most snack bars are either joyless diet food or full of ingredients that disrupt your gut. 100 Cal Snacks are formulated specifically for the gut-brain axis - using prebiotic fiber, KSM-66 ashwagandha, and real functional ingredients at clinically relevant levels.

Every calorie earns its place.

settings.question: What products do you currently offer?
settings.answer: We currently have three products: Chocolate Brownie Protein Bar, Peanut Butter Protein Bar, and BBQ Protein Puffs. Each is 100 calories, formulated for the gut-brain axis, and free from artificial ingredients and sugar alcohols.

settings.question: What is the gut-brain axis and why does it matter?
settings.answer:
The gut-brain axis is the two-way communication network between your digestive system and your brain. Your gut microbiome influences hunger signals, mood, energy, and cravings.

Snacks formulated with prebiotic fiber and adaptogens can support this system - helping to regulate cravings rather than spike and crash them.

settings.question: Why do you use monk fruit instead of sugar alcohols?
settings.answer:
We use monk fruit - zero glycemic impact, no digestive side effects, and it doesn't disrupt your gut microbiome. No erythritol, no maltitol, no xylitol.

Sugar alcohols can cause bloating and may disrupt the beneficial gut bacteria we're trying to feed.

settings.question: Are 100 Cal Snacks suitable for keto?
settings.answer: Yes - each serving contains fewer than 3g net carbs, making them keto-compatible.

settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: In-stock orders typically ship within 1-2 business days and arrive within 2-3 business days after dispatch.

settings.question: Do you offer free shipping?
settings.answer: Yes - free shipping on all orders over $25. Orders under $25 have a flat shipping rate calculated at checkout.

settings.question: How does the Subscribe & Save discount work?
settings.answer: Subscribe to any product and save 10% on every order. You choose the delivery frequency and we take care of the rest.

settings.question: Can I pause or cancel my subscription?
settings.answer: Yes - any time, no penalties, no questions. Log into your account and manage from there, or email us and we will handle it within 24 hours.

settings.question: Where can I find 100 Cal Snacks in stores?
settings.answer: We are currently available at Gelson's Markets across Southern California, Vicente Foods in Brentwood, and Rainbow Acres in West LA.

settings.question: Are you expanding to more stores?
settings.answer: Yes - new retail doors are opening and new partnerships are in progress. Subscribe to our emails to hear about new locations as they go live.
